title: lithocarpus rufescens
intro: Lithocarpus rufescens, also known as the Coastal Live Oak or California Nutmeg, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus rufescens include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an anti-cancer agent due to its high content of flavonoids and tannins. Lithocarpus rufescens is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, with traditional uses including treating fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
